workContext.summary: John正在从事量子计算研究，专注于量子电路中梯度消失问题（barren plateaus）的论文复现。项目位于`/mnt/user-data/workspace/quantum_barren_plateaus/`，使用Python实现量子电路模拟和梯度分析实验。

personalContext.summary: 使用中文交流。期望agent能够主动查证和验证系统能力，而不是基于假设行事。

topOfMind.summary: John当前正在进行量子电路barren plateaus论文复现项目。Fig.5实验已完成n_B=10/15/20的定值复现，Fig.6实验脚本已就绪等待执行。已了解Google Willow量子处理器（105 qubits，实现可验证量子优势，速度比经典超算快13000倍）和Microsoft Majorana 1（拓扑量子处理器）等前沿动态。同时关注量子计算领域最新突破——D-Wave量子霸权、哈佛/QuEra 448量子比特处理器、IBM Condor千量子比特处理器等重大进展。

recentMonths.summary: John完成了量子电路barren plateaus论文的复现工作。成功完成了Fig.5实验，对n_B=10/15/20进行了定值复现，验证了局部梯度（n_B=10时1.85e-04，n_B=20时4.17e-05）和全局梯度（n_B=10时1.41e-06，n_B=20时3.64e-14）的差异现象，发现局部代价呈多项式衰减~O(1/n²)而全局代价呈指数衰减。Fig.6实验脚本已就绪（n_b=10, layers=2-20, 9 seeds, max_iter=80），等待用户决策后执行。John还通过general-purpose agent收集了2025-2026年量子计算领域的最新研究进展，包括Google Willow、Microsoft Majorana 1、D-Wave量子霸权、哈佛/QuEra 448量子比特处理器等重大突破。

earlierContext.summary: No earlier recorded interactions. This is the initial establishment of the John-Project-Manager partnership.

longTermBackground.summary: John operates with an autonomous agent搭档 (partner) model rather than a traditional assistant model. Prefers to focus on high-level strategic decisions and delegate execution logistics and project coordination to the agent.

facts.content: User's name is John - the agent explicitly identifies as 'John's autonomous partner'
Project-Manager is an open-source super agent designed as an autonomous scheduling layer for end-to-end delivery

Two primary work types: (1) paper reproduction (knowledge acquisition → code implementation → experimental verification → report) and (2) project development (requirement breakdown → architecture design → coding → delivery)
Agent follows dependency chain: Researcher → Architect → Programmer → Executor-Environment → Debugger → Reviewer → Docs, with quality gates between stages
John's role: define directions, make macro decisions; agent's role: manage logistics, orchestrate execution - not a traditional assistant relationship but a partnership
User communicates in Chinese
Two sub-agent types available: (1) general-purpose - for research, code exploration, file operations, multi-step analysis; (2) bash - for git operations, build, test, deployment
Task tool limitation: max 3 concurrent calls per response, exceeding this will be dropped by the system

Available skills include: academic-paper-review, systematic-literature-review, deep-research, code-documentation, github-deep-research, skill-creator, find-skills, chart-visualization, frontend-design, image-generation, video-generation, podcast-generation, ppt-generation, newsletter-generation, consulting-analysis, data-analysis, vercel-deploy, bootstrap, surprise-me, web-design-guidelines, claude-to-deerflow (18+ skills total)
John's interaction style: systematic exploration of agent capabilities through targeted questions rather than assumptions

Logical workflow roles (Researcher, Architect, Programmer, Executor-Environment, Debugger, Reviewer, Docs) are abstraction layers mapped to general-purpose sub-agents via task labels, NOT separate callable agents
The scheduling mechanism works as: John指令 → Project-Manager编排 → 实际sub-agent(general-purpose/bash) → 分配角色标签 → 执行工作
John's questioning style progresses from surface capabilities to deep architectural understanding - asks 'why' and 'how' after learning what exists
逻辑角色标签（如[Researcher]）有三个作用：(1)追踪工作流位置，(2)质量门禁时识别产出归属，(3)日志和状态管理
John的追问模式：在了解基本机制后会继续追问实现细节，寻求对调度逻辑的完整理解
John发出了正式的项目启动指令，要求开启沙箱并开始写项目，标志其进入项目交付阶段
John使用直接行动式指令风格：明确要求开启沙箱（开发/测试环境）并启动项目开发
John当前处于项目启动准备阶段，等待输入具体项目需求后才能开始调度
沙箱包含三个目录：/mnt/user-data/uploads（上传文件）、/mnt/user-data/workspace（工作区，临时文件）、/mnt/user-data/outputs（最终交付物）
John的工作流程：先开启沙箱并准备文件，再提供项目需求，最后由代理启动调度链
John使用“先...我好...”句式表达指令，表示前置条件完成后才进行下一步
Project-Manager遵循clarification_system规则：必须先获得明确需求才能开始调度，不能凭假设行动
John目前处于项目启动准备阶段，等待文件复制完成和需求输入
John正在进行论文"Cost function dependent barren plateaus in shallow parametrized quantum circuits"的复现研究
关键发现：局部代价梯度呈多项式衰减~O(1/n²)，全局代价梯度呈指数衰减
n_B=25/30实验因资源限制（resource wall/timeout）未能完成
项目核心代码位于`src/barren_impl/`，包含11个模块：ansatz.py, autoencoder.py, config.py, cost.py, experiment_config.py, gradient_scaling.py, optimizer.py, states.py, visualize_circuit.py等
实验脚本：`experiments/main.py`和`experiments/run_fig6_experiment.py`
输出目录：`output/figures/`和`output/results/`存放实验结果
Fig.6实验脚本已就绪：使用LocalCost、SPSAOptimizer，n_b=10固定，layers从2到20变化，9个随机种子，max_iterations=80
Fig.6输出目标：`runs/fig6_local_layers/fig6_local_layers.png`
Fig.5实验结论：n_B=20时全局代价在~140次迭代后出现plateau现象
John当前面临关键决策点：选择执行Fig.6、扩展Fig.5到更多n_B值、或生成分析报告
Fig.5实验中n_B=20时全局梯度3.64e-14已被认为是关键plateau证据
John不仅专注于barren plateaus论文复现项目，还同时关注量子计算领域的最新突破和趋势
Agent误称调用了用户自定义的researcher agent，实际上系统中不存在该agent——这是逻辑角色标签而非独立可调用的代理。用户指出后agent才验证确认
facts.sourceError: Agent claimed to have called a custom 'researcher agent' defined by the user, but no such agent exists in the system

facts.content: 系统中只有两种子代理类型：general-purpose（通用任务）和bash（命令执行）
John期望agent能够主动查证系统能力，而不是基于假设或未经核实的记忆来响应
skills目录包含18个内置skills：deep-research、academic-paper-review、systematic-literature-review、github-deep-research、code-documentation等
2025-2026年量子计算重大进展：Google Willow（105 qubits，可验证量子优势，速度比经典超算快13000倍）、Microsoft Majorana 1（拓扑量子处理器）、D-Wave（真实世界问题量子霸权）、哈佛/QuEra（448量子比特中性原子处理器）、IBM Condor（千量子比特处理器）
John通过general-purpose agent执行了量子计算最新研究搜索任务，收集了量子电路优化（参数共享与梯度问题、贫瘠高原研究）、量子机器学习（QCNN架构优化、量子神经网络）、量子纠错（表面码突破、动态表面码、Qudit高维纠错）以及2025年量子计算产业动态（融资超46亿美元）等信息
